revision.comment: Usage text copied from [[:Template:Categorization of people disputed/doc]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === * See [[Wikipedia:BLPCAT]] for policy specific to categorization based on religion or sexual orientation. This template should be used on a category where there is a dispute about articles placed in that category.
If it seems clear to you that there are "inappropriate" articles in the category, add the {{tl|Subjective category}} disclaimer to the bottom of the text ''or'' the {{tl|Categorisation of people disputed}} dispute notice to the top of the text, in the category description. Allow some time for this notice to take effect—possibly help with some manual recategorization (if you are familiar with the topics of the articles to which this categorization was applied). Remove the "disclaimer"/"dispute notice" if the contents of this category seem OK again.
=== See also === * {{tl|Categorization of people disputed}} * {{tl|Contentious label}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates]] }}</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === * See [[Wikipedia:BLPCAT]] for policy specific to categorization based on religion or sexual orientation. This template should be used on a category where there is a dispute about articles placed in that category.
If it seems clear to you that there are "inappropriate" articles in the category, add the {{tl|Subjective category}} disclaimer to the bottom of the text ''or'' the {{tl|Categorisation of people disputed}} dispute notice to the top of the text, in the category description. Allow some time for this notice to take effect—possibly help with some manual recategorization (if you are familiar with the topics of the articles to which this categorization was applied). Remove the "disclaimer"/"dispute notice" if the contents of this category seem OK again.
=== See also === * {{tl|Categorization of people disputed}} * {{tl|Contentious label}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === * See [[Wikipedia:BLPCAT]] for policy specific to categorization based on religion or sexual orientation. This template should be used on a category where there is a dispute about articles placed in that category.
If it seems clear to you that there are "inappropriate" articles in the category, add the {{tl|Subjective category}} disclaimer to the bottom of the text ''or'' the {{tl|Categorisation of people disputed}} dispute notice to the top of the text, in the category description. Allow some time for this notice to take effect—possibly help with some manual recategorization (if you are familiar with the topics of the articles to which this categorization was applied). Remove the "disclaimer"/"dispute notice" if the contents of this category seem OK again.
=== See also === * {{tl|Categorization of people disputed}} * {{tl|Contentious label}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === * See [[Wikipedia:BLPCAT]] for policy specific to categorization based on religion or sexual orientation. This template should be used on a category where there is a dispute about articles placed in that category.
If it seems clear to you that there are "inappropriate" articles in the category, add the {{tl|Subjective category}} disclaimer to the bottom of the text ''or'' the {{tl|Categorisation of people disputed}} dispute notice to the top of the text, in the category description. Allow some time for this notice to take effect—possibly help with some manual recategorization (if you are familiar with the topics of the articles to which this categorization was applied). Remove the "disclaimer"/"dispute notice" if the contents of this category seem OK again.
=== See also === * {{tl|Categorization of people disputed}} * {{tl|Contentious label}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === * See [[Wikipedia:BLPCAT]] for policy specific to categorization based on religion or sexual orientation. This template should be used on a category where there is a dispute about articles placed in that category.
If it seems clear to you that there are "inappropriate" articles in the category, add the {{tl|Subjective category}} disclaimer to the bottom of the text ''or'' the {{tl|Categorisation of people disputed}} dispute notice to the top of the text, in the category description. Allow some time for this notice to take effect—possibly help with some manual recategorization (if you are familiar with the topics of the articles to which this categorization was applied). Remove the "disclaimer"/"dispute notice" if the contents of this category seem OK again.
=== See also === * {{tl|Categorization of people disputed}} * {{tl|Contentious label}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23606946259|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- PLEASE ADD CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS AT THE BOTTOM OF THIS PAGE -->
=== Usage === * See [[Wikipedia:BLPCAT]] for policy specific to categorization based on religion or sexual orientation. This template should be used on a category where there is a dispute about articles placed in that category.
If it seems clear to you that there are "inappropriate" articles in the category, add the {{tl|Subjective category}} disclaimer to the bottom of the text ''or'' the {{tl|Categorisation of people disputed}} dispute notice to the top of the text, in the category description. Allow some time for this notice to take effect—possibly help with some manual recategorization (if you are familiar with the topics of the articles to which this categorization was applied). Remove the "disclaimer"/"dispute notice" if the contents of this category seem OK again.
=== See also === * {{tl|Categorization of people disputed}} * {{tl|Contentious label}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Category header templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
